healthcheck_config.description: Validates bot token via Telegram getMe endpoint

metadata.summary: Telegram bot for messaging, notifications, and group automation.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Open Telegram and search for @BotFather
2. Send /newbot and follow the prompts to name your bot
3. BotFather will give you a token like 123456:ABC-DEF...
4. Copy the bot token and paste it here
